query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A long, straight institutional hallway with beige cinder block walls and gray carpet extends toward a pair of brown double doors with small rectangular windows at the far end, located beneath an exit sign. Fluorescent tube lights run along the dropped ceiling, illuminating the corridor. Several rectangular wooden frames hang vertically on both walls. The perspective draws the eye to a central vanishing point at the doors.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A long, straight institutional hallway with beige cinder block walls and gray carpet extends toward a pair of brown double doors with small rectangular windows beneath an exit sign. Fluorescent tube lights run along the dropped ceiling while rectangular wooden frames line both walls. The scene is rendered in heavily muted, faded tones with low vibrancy and an overall washed-out palette that contributes to an atmosphere of distress and unease, evoking a suffocating melancholy through the repetitive, empty corridor.
